subject: Re: SLURM and error
body:
What Ricardo said - the root cause is that WarpTools (the process) communicates with WarpWorker processes over HTTP, some HPCs route all HTTP traffic through a proxy and that can be slow
I don’t know too much about networking but rerouting http traffic over localhost seems a bit overzealous to me…
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Mar 5, 2025, at 12:10, Ricardo Righetto <ricardorighetto@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿
I'm not entirely sure, but this might be fixed with
export no_proxy="localhost,127.0.0.1"
or if you have a lua modulefile:
setenv("no_proxy", "localhost,127.0.0.1")
Best wishes,
--
Ricardo Diogo Righetto
Em qua., 5 de mar. de 2025 às 20:57, Huy Bui <
huybk81@gmail.com
> escreveu:
I use Warp in our cluster. Occasionally, I got this error.
Workers cannot be connected within the allotted time. 
Does anyone have this problem? It doesn't always happen unfortunately but when it happened, we tried so many ways to get around but never worked :(
Best,
Huy
